headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录279篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目50篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API10篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中16%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ koala73 /worldmonitor：Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and i

▸ ayghri /i-have-adhd：A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.

▸ jamiepine /voicebox：The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

▸ diegosouzapw /OmniRoute：Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi,

▸ ComposioHQ /awesome-claude-skills：A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
text: 今日共收录279篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目50篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API10篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中16%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
